texto: The door of the judge's house was opened to him by a huge, bearded man who informed the reporter in a conversational tone that if he did not leave the village immediately he would not leave it with his arms unbroken.
explicacao: Citação de Phil Rickman sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “The door of the judge's house was opened to him by a huge, bearded man who informed the reporter …” articula reflexao, horror, leave em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
